## What does this change?


## Type
- [ ] Company/broker data update
- [ ] New state privacy law
- [ ] Template / legal wording change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature / UI
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist
- [ ] No new servers, analytics, or trackers; no user data leaves the device.
- [ ] If I edited `data/brokers.json`, I regenerated `js/brokers.js`.
- [ ] New privacy contacts or statutes include a source.
- [ ] The Browse, Sent, Learn, and Settings tabs still work.

## Notes / sources
